item.title: Ketogenic diet therapy for epilepsy in conjunction with concurrent inflammatory bowel disease: Case series and recommendations.
item.description: Epilepsy research - The combined occurrence of ketogenic diet therapy (KDT) and inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) has not been previously described. Seven patients from 6 institutions were identified from 2005 to 2025....

item.title: β-Glucan and Inulin Estimated Intake Are Associated With Reduced Risk of Crohn's Disease, Improved Gut Barrier and Systemic Inflammation Markers, and Multi-Omic Signatures in a High-Risk Cohort.
item.description: Gastroenterology - The cause of Crohn's Disease (CD) remains unclear; however evidence suggests fiber intake may play a role. We aimed to investigate the association between intake of total fiber and select fermentab...
